summary: Resolve the exact 7-Zip version through its unique startup banner when PATH selects a versionless executable shim.

decisions.decision: Invoke the exact PATH-resolved 7-Zip executable without an operation and accept only one case-sensitive startup banner beginning with '7-Zip ' followed by a digit.
decisions.rationale: The host resolves C:/Users/Scott/scoop/shims/7z.exe, whose Windows ProductVersion is blank, while the delegated tool emits exactly one '7-Zip 26.02 (x64)' banner. Requiring one structured banner records the actual delegated tool version without accepting usage text as a successful extraction or weakening the subsequent exact payload-hash check.

testEvidence.criterion: The cleanroom wrapper resolves one exact 7-Zip version when PATH selects a versionless shim.
testEvidence.test: Require the dedicated banner parser, reject both generic --version and file-metadata paths, parse the PowerShell source, and probe the exact PATH-resolved shim.

red.command: powershell.exe -NoLogo -NoProfile -NonInteractive -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/windows/run-packaged-desktop-evidence.ps1 [exact final-main evidence arguments] -N2SoakMode disabled
red.outcome: RED: preflight stopped before build and Sandbox because the PATH-resolved Scoop shim has no ProductVersion metadata.

green.command: pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/scripts/packaged-desktop-evidence.test.ts -t "fails closed before staging unless a clean HEAD is built at the canonical target" --reporter=default; PowerShell parser check; exact shim banner probe
green.outcome: GREEN: the focused contract passed, PowerShell parsed without errors, and the exact resolved shim produced one accepted banner: 7-Zip 26.02 (x64).

attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
